370     active_clause = "AND COALESCE(source_active, TRUE) = TRUE" if require_source_active else ""
371     sql = f"""
372         SELECT id, source, source_id, numero_controle_pncp, orgao_cnpj, orgao_nome,
373                municipio, uf, objeto, modalidade, valor_estimado,
374                status_canonico, ranking, ranking_score,
375                data_publicacao, data_abertura, data_encerramento,
376                link_edital, run_id, last_seen_source_run_id, crawl_batch_id,
377                ingested_at, updated_at, source_active
378         FROM opportunity_intel
379         WHERE is_active = TRUE
380           AND status_canonico IN ('open', 'upcoming')
381           {active_clause}
382         ORDER BY
383           CASE ranking WHEN 'GO' THEN 0 WHEN 'REVIEW' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
384           data_encerramento NULLS LAST
385         LIMIT %s
386     """  # noqa: S608 — active_clause is fixed boolean branch only
387     conn = psycopg2.connect(dsn, cursor_factory=psycopg2.extras.RealDictCursor)
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

846         # Constant fragment only — not user input (S608 false positive)
847         f"""
848         SELECT c.contrato_id, c.orgao_cnpj, c.orgao_nome, c.fornecedor_cnpj, c.fornecedor_nome,
849                c.objeto_contrato, c.valor_total, c.data_inicio, c.data_fim, c.data_publicacao,
850                c.uf, c.municipio, c.source, c.source_id, c.ingested_at, c.source_date_semantics,
851                c.orgao_cnpj_8
852         FROM pncp_supplier_contracts c
853         WHERE COALESCE(c.is_active, TRUE)
854           AND {_EXTRA_UNIVERSE_ORGAO}
855           AND (
856             c.data_publicacao >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'
857             OR c.data_fim >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
858             OR c.data_fim BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '180 days'
859           )
860         ORDER BY COALESCE(c.data_publicacao, c.data_fim) DESC NULLS LAST
861         LIMIT %s
862         """,  # noqa: S608
863         (limit,),
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

878         conn,
879         f"""
880         SELECT c.fornecedor_cnpj, c.fornecedor_nome,
881                COUNT(*)::int AS n_contratos,
882                SUM(c.valor_total)::numeric AS soma_valor_contratado,
883                COUNT(DISTINCT c.orgao_cnpj)::int AS n_orgaos
884         FROM pncp_supplier_contracts c
885         WHERE COALESCE(c.is_active, TRUE)
886           AND {_EXTRA_UNIVERSE_ORGAO}
887           AND c.fornecedor_cnpj IS NOT NULL
888           AND COALESCE(c.data_publicacao, c.data_inicio, c.ingested_at)
889               >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '365 days'
890         GROUP BY c.fornecedor_cnpj, c.fornecedor_nome
891         ORDER BY n_contratos DESC, soma_valor_contratado DESC NULLS LAST
